purpose: Every generated business/admin page must resolve to a business page family, task flow, page profile, and module contract before rendering.
selection_policy: Classify page family before selecting layout or components.
Use the selected page profile required sections as the first page skeleton.
Use task-flow-standard.json to determine loading, empty, approval, locked, import, export, and bulk-action states.
Use data-model-standard.json for all generated field and column metadata.
forbidden_patterns: marketing hero as the first screen for operational backend requests
generic dashboard layout when the request is an approval, detail, form, import result, permission, or exception page
undocumented page sections that cannot be mapped to a profile
